headline: 3 Reasons CDW is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: CDW has gotten torched over the last six months - since September 2025, its stock price has dropped 25.9% to $124.43 per share. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Why Is CDW (CDW) Down 11.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
